visual_description: In a dimly lit night setting, a man with long hair wearing a dark, buttoned coat stands centrally, holding a torch that casts a flickering flame. He is surrounded by a crowd of people in rugged, dark clothing, some holding sticks or weapons, all facing forward. The background is shadowy, with limited visibility emphasizing a tense atmosphere.
audio_description: The faint crackle of the torch flame is audible, accompanied by low murmuring from the surrounding crowd. No distinct speech is discernible.
